title: fumaria africana var. ochracea
intro: Fumaria africana var. ochracea is a variety of the Fumaria plant, commonly known as fumitory or earth-smoke, a flowering plant species in the family Papaveraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Fumaria africana var. ochracea is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
